indexdef: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX catch_entries_pkey ON public.catch_entries USING btree (id)

CREATE INDEX idx_catch_entries_user_date ON public.catch_entries USING btree (user_id, caught_on DESC)
CREATE INDEX idx_catch_entries_water_source ON public.catch_entries USING btree (water_source)

CREATE INDEX idx_club_members_club_code ON public.club_members USING btree (club_code)
CREATE INDEX idx_club_members_club_id ON public.club_members USING btree (club_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_club_members_club_member_no_unique ON public.club_members USING btree (club_id, club_member_no) WHERE (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM club_member_no), ''::text) IS NOT NULL)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX fishing_trips_pkey ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (id)
CREATE INDEX idx_fishing_trips_canonical_membership_id ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (canonical_membership_id)

CREATE INDEX idx_fishing_trips_trip_catch_context_id ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (trip_catch_context_id)

CREATE INDEX idx_fishing_trips_water_source ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (water_source)

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_fishing_trips_user_date_member_no_catch ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (user_id, trip_date, member_water_id) WHERE ((entry_type = 'no_catch'::text) AND (water_source = 'member'::text) AND (member_water_id IS NOT NULL))

CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_fishing_trips_user_date_official_no_catch ON public.fishing_trips USING btree (user_id, trip_date, water_body_id) WHERE ((entry_type = 'no_catch'::text) AND (water_source = 'official'::text) AND (water_body_id IS NOT NULL))
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_canonical_membership_id ON public.profiles USING btree (canonical_membership_id)

CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_member_card_valid ON public.profiles USING btree (member_card_valid, member_card_valid_until)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_must_change_password ON public.profiles USING btree (must_change_password)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_must_verify_identity ON public.profiles USING btree (must_verify_identity) WHERE (must_verify_identity = true)
CREATE INDEX idx_profiles_tenant_id ON public.profiles USING btree (tenant_id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_email_key ON public.profiles USING btree (email)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX profiles_pkey ON public.profiles USING btree (id)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX uq_profiles_club_member_no ON public.profiles USING btree (COALESCE(club_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'::uuid), member_no)
